title.en: CHAIRS; SOFAS; BEDS
Chairs adapted for special purposes (chairs or personal conveyances specially adapted for patients or disabled persons, e.g. wheelchairs, A61G5/00; operating chairs or dental chairs A61G15/00)
Reclining or easy chairs
Hairdressers' or similar chairs
Theatre, auditorium or similar chairs (detachable seats for mounting on stadium benches A47C1/16)
Beach chairs {; Chairs for outdoor use, e.g. chairs for relaxation or sun-tanning}
Seats detachably mounted on stadium benches
Chairs characterised by structural features; Chairs or stools with rotatable or vertically-adjustable seats (A47C1/00, A47C4/00 take precedence)
Rocking chairs
Stackable chairs or nesting chairs
with shell-shaped seat and back-rest unit, e.g. having arm-rests
of asymmetrical shape
of legless type, e.g. with seat directly resting on the floor (A47C3/14 takes precedence); Hassocks; Pouffes
Chairs or stools with rotatable seat (adjustable in height by rotation A47C3/24)
Chairs or stools with vertically-adjustable seats
Foldable, collapsible or dismountable chairs (of tubular metal type A47C5/10)
Dismountable chairs
Folding chairs with inflexible seats
Folding chairs with flexible coverings for the seat or back elements
Trunk chairs, i.e. chairs collapsible to trunk shape
Inflatable chairs
Chairs of special materials
{of paper, cardboard or similar pliable material}
{of woven material, e.g.} basket chairs
Metal chairs, e.g. tubular (rocking chairs having elastic frames made of tubular material A47C3/023)
of plastics, with or without reinforcement
characterised by the use of laminated wood
Parts, details, or accessories of chairs or stools
{Chair or stool bases (A47C3/20 takes precedence)}
Seat parts
Supports for the head or the back

Supports for the feet or the legs (reclining or easy chairs having coupled adjustable supporting parts including a leg-rest or foot-rest A47C1/034; reclining or easy chairs having coupled adjustable supporting parts including a head-rest in combination with a leg-rest or foot-rest A47C1/037)
Supports for the arms
Parts or details of tipping-up chairs, e.g. of theatre chairs
Accessories for chairs
Stools for specified purposes
{with exercising means or having special therapeutic or ergonomic effects}
{High stools, e.g. bar stools}
Office stools; Workshop stools
Milking stools
Wall stools
Music stools
Camp, travelling, or sports stools
Benches not otherwise provided for
{having multiple separate seats}
Church benches; Confessionals
Step-stools
requiring conversion between the step and seat functions
Convertible chairs, stools or benches (step-stools requiring conversion between the step and seat functions A47C12/02)
{Modular seating}
Other seating furniture
{Corner seating furniture, e.g. corner sofas}
{Seating furniture for specified purposes not covered by main groups A47C1/00 or A47C9/00}
Stand-alone rests or supports for feet, legs, arms, back or head
{Back-rests}
Footstools; Foot-rests; Leg-rests
Prayer stools; Kneeling stools; Kneeling supports
Sofas; Couches; Beds
Sofas, couches, settees, or the like, without movable parts
{Seating furniture, e.g.} sofas, couches, settees, or the like, with movable parts {changeable to beds}; Chair beds
Wall beds
Cabinet beds; Table beds, or like beds; Wardrobe beds
Travelling or camp beds (stretchers A61G1/00)
Suspended beds, e.g. suspended from ceiling (hammocks A45F3/22)
Parts or details specially adapted for beds, sofas or couches not fully covered by any single one of groups A47C17/02 - A47C17/84
Bedsteads
{dismountable}
Parts or details of bedsteads not fully covered in a single one of the following subgroups, e.g. bed rails, post rails
Extensible bedsteads, e.g. with adjustment of length, width, height
Folding bedsteads
Multi-stage bedsteads; Bedsteads stackable to multi-stage bedsteads
Combinations of bedsteads with other furniture or with accessories, e.g. with bedside cabinets
Head-, foot- or like rests for beds, sofas or the like
of detachable type (A47C20/04, A47C20/08 take precedence)
with adjustable inclination (A47C20/08 takes precedence)
with means for adjusting two or more rests simultaneously
Attachments for beds, e.g. sheet holders or bed-cover holders (bed tables supported on the bedstead A47B23/02); Ventilating, cooling or heating means in connection with bedsteads or mattresses
{Lighting, radio, telephone or the like connected to the bedstead}
{Oscillating, balancing or vibrating mechanisms connected to the bedstead}
{Holders for loose bed elements, e.g.} sheet holders; bed cover holders
Devices for ventilating, cooling or heating
Mattress underlays
Devices for prevention against falling-out, e.g. detachable side walls
Spring mattresses with rigid frame or forming part of the bedstead, e.g. box springs; Divan bases; Slatted bed bases
{with separate resilient support elements, e.g. elastomeric springs arranged in a two-dimensional matrix pattern}
{foldable or dismountable}
{Edge stiffeners}
using leaf springs, e.g. metal strips (wooden springs A47C23/06)
using springs in compression, e.g. coiled
using wooden springs, e.g. of slat type
using tensioned springs, e.g. flat type (A47C23/02 takes precedence)
using combinations of springs covered by more than one of the groups A47C23/02 - A47C23/12; Frames therefor
with provisions for giving extra support for the head or the legs
Spring, stuffed or fluid mattresses {or cushions} specially adapted for chairs, beds or sofas
{with several cushions, mattresses or the like, to be put together in one cover}
{Mattress or cushion tickings or covers}
with spring inlays (A47C27/20 takes precedence)
Fluid mattresses
with fibrous inlays, e.g. made of wool, of cotton
with foamed material inlays
with both fibrous and foamed material inlays
Nets for protection against insects in connection with chairs or beds; Bed canopies
{Bed canopies}
{Mosquito nets}
Details or accessories for chairs, beds, or the like, not provided for in other groups of this subclass, e.g. upholstery fasteners, mattress protectors, stretching devices for mattress nets
{Fireproof means}
{Anti-earthquake means}
{Magnets}
{Means for protecting against undesired influence, e.g. magnetic radiation or static electricity}
{Use of aromatic materials, e.g. herbs}
{Use of three-dimensional fabrics}
{Anti-mite, anti-allergen or anti-bacterial means}
{Use of remote controls}
Upholstery attaching means
Mattress hand-straps
Loose {or removable} furniture covers
Means, e.g. measuring means, for adapting chairs, beds or mattresses to the shape or weight of persons
